Bash(cd "E:\\AI Data\\Mica-app" && npm install ffmpeg-static --save-dev 2>&1 | tail -3)
Bash(cd "E:\\AI Data\\Mica-app" && mv public/media/video1_opt.mp4 public/media/video1.mp4 && ls -la public/media/)
Bash(cd "E:\\AI Data\\Mica-app" && mv public/media/video1_h264.mp4 public/media/video1.mp4 && ls -lh public/media/)

Bash(cd "E:\\AI Data\\Mica-app" && node -e "
const ffmpegPath = require\('ffmpeg-static'\);
const { spawnSync } = require\('child_process'\);
const r = spawnSync\(ffmpegPath, [
  '-i', 'public/media/video1.mp4',
  '-c:v', 'libx264',
  '-preset', 'fast',
  '-crf', '23',
  '-vf', 'scale=720:-2,format=yuv420p',
  '-colorspace', 'bt709',
  '-color_primaries', 'bt709',
  '-color_trc', 'bt709',
  '-c:a', 'aac',
  '-b:a', '128k',
  '-movflags', '+faststart',
  'public/media/video1_fix.mp4',
  '-y'
], { encoding: 'utf8', stdio: 'inherit' }\);
console.log\('exit code:', r.status\);
")
